buildOrders.name: Fast Castle
buildOrders.description: Rush to Castle Age with ~21 villagers, skipping military investment in Feudal Age.

buildOrders.name: 19 Vils 1-Range Archers
buildOrders.author: Hera
buildOrders.description: Go up quickly to Feudal and mass archers from a single range, prioritising Fletching for a faster Castle Age.

buildOrders.name: Fast Archer Opening
buildOrders.author: Capoch
buildOrders.civilization: Britons, Ethiopians, Mayans, Malay, Saracens, Vietnamese
buildOrders.description: Solid archer opening for wallable land maps. Hit Feudal at 7:30 and punish opponents who fail to fully wall.

buildOrders.name: 18 Vils Scouts into Cavalry Archers
buildOrders.author: Hera
buildOrders.description: Play safe with scouts in Feudal Age, fully wall, then transition into Cavalry Archers for a devastating Castle Age.

buildOrders.name: Fast Castle All In — Celts Hoang Push
buildOrders.author: Capoch
buildOrders.description: Pre-Mill Drush into Fast Castle with a forward Siege Workshop. Celts' siege bonus makes this push devastating if unchecked.

buildOrders.name: Zeus Rush
buildOrders.description: Leverage Zeus' passive favor generation and Bolt divine power for an early attack.
